# Problem Statements for Stress Testing

> Auto-generated batch 3 — 10 problems for self-healing loop.

## Insurance

1. "Our insurance company processes 50,000 claims monthly from 12 regional offices. We need automated fraud scoring on incoming claims, actuarial loss-ratio dashboards, and a policyholder risk segmentation model that updates quarterly."

2. "We're an insurtech startup building parametric weather insurance. We ingest NOAA weather station feeds and satellite precipitation data in real-time to auto-trigger payouts when rainfall thresholds are breached. We need an audit log for every trigger event."

## Retail

3. "Our grocery chain has 400 stores with shelf cameras and RFID inventory tags. We need demand forecasting per SKU per store, automated replenishment alerts, and markdown optimization based on sell-through velocity and expiration dates."

4. "We run a fashion e-commerce marketplace. We want to analyze customer browsing patterns, size-return correlations, and product recommendation effectiveness. Our data warehouse needs to handle 200 million events per day from our CDN logs."

## Government

5. "Our city water utility monitors 10,000 pressure sensors and flow meters across the distribution network. We need leak detection alerts within 60 seconds, consumption pattern analytics for billing, and infrastructure aging models for capital planning."

6. "We're a state tax authority. We need to cross-match income filings with employer W-2 submissions, flag discrepancies for audit, and provide self-service analytics for revenue forecasting while ensuring taxpayer PII protection."

## Logistics

7. "Our freight brokerage handles 5,000 shipments daily. We need to optimize carrier assignments using historical on-time performance, fuel cost predictions, and route weather overlays. Dispatchers want a map-based tracking dashboard."

8. "We operate a cold-chain logistics network for vaccines. Temperature loggers transmit every 30 seconds from 2,000 refrigerated containers. Any excursion above threshold must trigger immediate alerts and generate compliance documentation for CDC audit."

## Mining

9. "Our open-pit copper mine runs haul trucks with onboard telemetry — tire pressure, engine temp, payload weight. We need predictive maintenance to reduce unplanned downtime, shift productivity analytics, and environmental compliance reporting for dust and water usage."

10. "We're a mining exploration company. We need to consolidate geochemical assay results, drill-hole logs, and geophysical survey data into a 3D block model. Geologists need to query cross-sections and export to Leapfrog via API."
